metadata.description: Claude Code skills for research and orchestration workflows.

plugins.name: delegate
plugins.description: Delegate heavy or token-expensive tasks from Claude Code to Codex CLI (GPT) and Antigravity CLI (Gemini), plus an independent Claude delegate (isolated config dir, OAuth token auth) usable as a majority-of-3 third voter or an agentic worker. Write output to a file and read only the STATUS/VERDICT header to keep the main context clean.

plugins.name: gemini-pdf
plugins.description: Convert PDFs to clean Markdown (LaTeX math, tables, section structure) via Antigravity CLI, with auto-chunking for long papers, a quality-score gate, and an optional Mathpix fallback.
